business.name: Lea Heating and Plumbing
business.tagline: Reliable Heating and Plumbing in Leeds

sample_reviews.author: Sarah M
sample_reviews.text: Lea came out quickly to fix our boiler in the middle of winter. Professional, tidy and reasonably priced. Would highly recommend.

sample_reviews.author: James T
sample_reviews.text: Excellent service from start to finish. New boiler installed efficiently and at a great price. Very knowledgeable and friendly.

sample_reviews.author: Patricia H
sample_reviews.text: Prompt, reliable and honest. Carried out our annual boiler service without any fuss. Will be using again next year.

brand.usp: Lea Heating and Plumbing brings honest, expert gas and plumbing services to homes across Leeds, with a personal touch and reliable workmanship you can count on.
brand.hero_headline: Your Trusted Gas Engineer in Leeds
brand.about_paragraph: I'm a Gas Safe registered engineer based in LS17, providing heating and plumbing services across Leeds and the surrounding areas. Whether you need a new boiler fitted, an annual service, or an urgent plumbing repair, I pride myself on turning up on time, keeping things tidy, and getting the job done right first time. With years of experience in the trade, I offer honest advice and competitive pricing with no hidden costs.
